job:
Create a complete AI Code Review Assistant workspace at `workspace/code-review-assistant/`.

Set up the full TypeScript project structure including:
- `src/analyzer/` with diff-parser.ts, pattern-seeker.ts, and metrics.ts
- `src/reviewer/` with llm-client.ts (OpenAI/Anthropic compatible), prompt-builder.ts, and comment-generator.ts
- `src/platforms/` with github.ts for PR integration
- `config/review-rules.yml` for customizable review rules
- `config/prompts/` directory for LLM prompt templates
- `tests/fixtures/` with sample diffs for testing
- `docs/architecture.md` documenting the design
- package.json, tsconfig.json, and README.md

Implement core functionality:
- Diff parser that extracts file changes, additions, deletions from unified diff format
- Pattern seeker to detect security issues, common bugs, style violations
- LLM client supporting OpenAI and Anthropic APIs for generating contextual reviews
- GitHub integration to fetch PR diffs using GitHub API
- CLI tool at `src/index.ts` that takes a PR URL/diff and outputs a review with line-by-line comments

Include sample review rules covering security, performance, and maintainability checks. Create prompt templates for code review generation. Write a comprehensive README with setup instructions, architecture overview, and usage examples. Ensure all code is TypeScript with proper type definitions in `src/types.ts`.
